data.name: Mommy's Milk and Cookies - Christmas Sex Puzzles
data.detailed_description:
Relax, lay back, and finish your puzzle. Mommy's orders!

Solve over 170 gorgeous, sexual puzzles at your pleasure. You choose the difficulty.

It's Christmas Break. You're home from College. Mommy missed you, son.

Now lay back, and listen to your Mother encourage you while you do your puzzle :)

Even though you're 21 now, you're still Mommy's good boy. And you always will be!

In this game you will:

1. Be able to choose between over 170 unique, beautiful Mommy puzzles to complete.

2. Be able to choose the difficulty of your puzzle (how many pieces)

3. Listen to your Mommy encourage you while you play.

4. Have thousands of hours of sexual, arousing Christmas fun with Mommy.

data.short_description: Merry Christmas, son. Relax, lay back, and finish your puzzle while Mommy finishes Christmas Dinner. Solve over 170 beautiful, sexual puzzles at your pleasure. Have thousands of hours of sexual fun with your Mother.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz Dual Core or similar
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 570 / ATI HD 6870
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.5 GHz Tri Core or similar
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 870 / AMD R9 270
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
